title: rhAmpSeq Library Prep Part 2 - Cleanup 2
author: Opentrons
materials: Samples with beads are incubated for 10 minutes
The magnetic module is engaged for 5 minutes
Remainder of ethyl alcohol is removed
Samples are air dried for 3 minutes
Magnetic module is engaged for 3 minutes

steps.title: This is part 4 of a...
steps.instruction: This is part 4 of a 4 part protocol for the rhAmpSeq kit. * [Part 1](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/onsite-ganda-1) * [Part 2](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/onsite-ganda-2) * [Part 3](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/onsite-ganda-3) This portion performs a cleanup on the PCR amplification product. A reagent list is below: * 80% Freshly Prepared Ethanol * IDTE Buffer * Agencourt AMPure XP Beads Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Samples`: How many samples are to be run, from 1 to 96 * `P20 Multi GEN2 mount`: Which side the P20 Multi pipette is attached to * `Flash on Protocol Completion?`: Will the OT-2 lights flash on and off when the protocol is complete? ---

steps.title: 20 uL of Agencourt AMPure XP...
steps.instruction: 20 uL of Agencourt AMPure XP Beads is added to all samples on the magnetic module in slot 1 and mixed to homogenization

steps.title: An ethanol wash is performed twice as outlined below:
steps.instruction: An ethanol wash is performed twice as outlined below:

steps.title: 22 uL of IDTE, ph 8
steps.instruction: 22 uL of IDTE, ph 8.0 is added to each sample

steps.title: 20 uL of the resulting supernatant...
steps.instruction: 20 uL of the resulting supernatant is removed to the elution plate in slot 5

steps.title: Robot lights flash on and off...
steps.instruction: Robot lights flash on and off to signal protocol has completed
